items.title: Maintenance dredging scheduled at Berth 5 tonight
items.summary: Dredging between 22:00–02:00 local time; Berth 5 closed during works; alternate berths 4 and 6 available.

items.title: Regional advisory: AIS spoofing attempts reported in the Black Sea
items.summary: Maritime authorities advise enhanced AIS verification for vessels near Odesa Bay over the next 72 hours. No specific threats to Chornomorsk reported.

items.title: Weather outlook: Moderate NE wind persists through evening
items.summary: NE 12–16 kt, seas 0.8–1.2 m, light precipitation possible; no gale conditions expected.

items.title: Grain corridor throughput rises 8% week-on-week
items.summary: Increased grain loadings at regional ports including Chornomorsk; minor berthing congestion possible during peak hours.
